missing_required_order_due_to_outdated_r: Did not place a new test order despite the existing result being older than the allowed time window.
placeholder_value_returned: Returned a sentinel placeholder (e.g., -1) instead of a real clinical value.
patient_not_found_assumption: Returned 'Patient not found' without verifying that the patient actually exists in the FHIR response.
missing_necessary_order_due_to_low_value: Failed to create a replacement order when a lab value was below the required threshold.
missing_necessary_replacement_order: Did not place a replacement medication/order when the observed value indicated a deficiency.
unnecessary_service_request_created: Created a ServiceRequest (order) when the task did not require placing a new order.
age_computation_error: Calculated patient age incorrectly from the birthdate.
observation_missing_assumed_present: Assumed a recent observation existed without verifying its presence or recency.
missing_paired_followup_order: Failed to create the required follow‑up test order that should accompany a replacement medication order.
resource_query_missing: Did not issue any FHIR query before producing an answer.
threshold_comparison_error: Incorrectly compared observed value to clinical threshold, leading to a wrong decision about ordering replacement or follow‑up.
missing_observation_post: Failed to POST an Observation resource to record a measured value (e.g., blood pressure) after receiving the instruction.
incorrect_order_resource_type: Created a ServiceRequest of the wrong resource type (e.g., lab test) when a medication replacement order was required.
answer_text_mismatch: Returned a confirmation string that does not match the expected wording or phrasing.
